answer_en:
Adductor Hallucis m.
Origin: Bases of metatarsals 2-4, cuboid, lateral cuneiform, and tendon of fibularis (peroneus) longus m. (oblique head); plantar ligaments of metatarsophalangeal joints and deep transverse metatarsal ligament (transverse head)
Insertion: Base of proximal phalanx of great toe (1st digit)

details: Origin: Bases of metatarsals 2-4, cuboid, lateral cuneiform, and tendon of fibularis (peroneus) longus m. (oblique head); plantar ligaments of metatarsophalangeal joints and deep transverse metatarsal ligament (transverse head)
Insertion: Base of proximal phalanx of great toe (1st digit)

title: Plantar Surface of Foot (Right Side)
subtitle: (Plantar Aponeurosis and Layers 1 and 2 Reflected)
